workflow.name: Generate course certificates from Google Sheets with Stencil PDF and Outlook
workflow.description:
# Automatically generate and send course certificates when new participants are added to Google Sheets

This workflow creates PDF certificates using Stencil, stores them in Google Drive, and emails them to participants.

## How it works

1. A new row is added to the Google Sheets document (via form, webhook, or manual entry)
2. The workflow generates a PDF certificate using the Stencil API
3. The PDF is uploaded to a Google Drive folder for archiving
4. The certificate is sent to the participant via Outlook
5. The Google Sheet is updated with the file link and send timestamp

## Setup steps

1. Create a free account at [stencilpdf.com](https://stencilpdf.com) and set up a certificate template
2. Connect your Google account and select the target Sheet and Drive folder
3. Connect your Outlook account for sending emails
4. Configure the Stencil API credentials (Bearer Auth)
5. Adjust the email template text as needed

## Prerequisites

- Free [Stencil](https://stencilpdf.com) account with certificate template
- Google account (Sheets + Drive)
- Outlook/Microsoft 365 account
```

workflow.name: Generate course certificates using Google Sheets, Stencil PDF, and Outlook

parameters.subject: Your certificate is ready
parameters.bodyContent:
=Hi {{$('Input').item.json.Participant}},

Congratulations on completing the course {{$('Input').item.json.Course}}!

Your certificate is attached. Thanks for learning with us.

Best,
Your learning company

parameters.content:
## How it works
This workflow automates course certificate generation and distribution. When a new participant is added to Google Sheets, the workflow generates a personalized PDF certificate using Stencil API, uploads it to Google Drive, sends it via Outlook email, and updates the sheet with tracking information.

The workflow runs hourly to check for new entries without a sent timestamp. The schedule can be adapted to your needs. It can also be triggered manually for testing purposes with sample data.

## Setup steps
1. Create a Stencil account and obtain your API bearer token for authentication [here](https://app.stencilpdf.com/profile)
2. Configure the report template ID in the Generate report node
3. Connect your Google Sheets account (for trigger and updates)
4. Connect your Google Drive account and set the target folder ID
5. Connect your Outlook account for email sending
6. Update the Google Sheet columns to match: Mail, Participant, Course, Exam, Date, File, Sent
7. Test the workflow using the Manual Trigger before activating
Filters unsent entries and consolidates data from different trigger sources
Creates personalized PDF certificate via Stencil API and stores it in Google Drive. Also it is linked to the participant int he google sheets document.
Finished certificate is sent via mail to the participant.

data.details: The Filter node can be used to filter items based on a condition. If the condition is met, the item will be passed on to the next node. If the condition is not met, the item will be omitted. Conditions can be combined together by AND(meet all conditions), or OR(meet at least one condition).
